folio.label: 204r
folio.l: and bygynnetú his tale of Multiplicacion ;
Witú this Chanou~ , I dwelt haue seuene ©ere
And of his science , am I neuere the nere
Al that I had , I haue lost ther by
And god wot , so han many moo than I

note.notetxt: double check moo. I cannot see very well the final o/ODR/

folio.l: There I was wont , to be rigút fressú and gay
Of clothynge , and of othere good array
Now may I were , an hose , vp on myn hed
And where my colour was , bothe fressú & red
